    Index

    A B C D E F G H I L M N O P R S T U V W Z 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    A

    adjustHumidity(double) - Method in class simulation.entities.Cell
    Adjusts the cell humidity by delta (positive = wetter, negative = drier).
    adjustHumidity(double) - Method in interface simulation.services.FireBehaviour
    Adjusts the cell humidity by delta (positive = wetter, negative = drier).
    amazonie() - Static method in class simulation.dao.PredefinedTopologies
    Très dense, très humide, traversée par un fleuve massif.
    applyEnvironment() - Method in class simulation.services.Simulator
    Re-applies the environment immediately to the current grid
    applyTo(Grid) - Method in class simulation.entities.Environment
    Applies the current environmental modifiers to all cells in the grid.

    B

    BASE_BURN_DURATION - Static variable in class simulation.config.Constants
    Base number of time steps a burning cell stays on fire.
    BinarySerializer - Class in simulation.dao
    Saves and restores the complete simulation state using Java binary serialisation.
    blocksfire() - Method in class simulation.entities.Cell
    Returns true if this cell type stops fire from propagating through it (water, firebreak, urban zone, wet zone).
    blocksfire() - Method in interface simulation.services.FireBehaviour
    Returns true if this cell type stops fire from propagating through it (water, firebreak, urban zone, wet zone).
    brousseAustralienne() - Static method in class simulation.dao.PredefinedTopologies
    Très clairsemée (faible densité), mais atrocement sèche et inflammable.
    burnDuration(Cell) - Static method in class simulation.utils.PhysicsFormulas
    How many time steps a cell will keep burning.
    BURNED - Enum constant in enum class simulation.entities.CellState
    The cell has finished burning and cannot catch fire again.

    C

    canIgnite() - Method in class simulation.entities.Cell
    Returns true if this cell can currently catch fire.
    canIgnite() - Method in interface simulation.services.FireBehaviour
    Returns true if this cell can currently catch fire.
    Cell - Class in simulation.entities
    Represents a single cell of the simulation grid.
    Cell(int, int) - Constructor for class simulation.entities.Cell
    Creates a cell at position (x, y) with default forest attributes and a random initial temperature.
    CELL_SIZE_PX - Static variable in class simulation.config.Constants
    Default pixel size of one grid cell.
    CellState - Enum Class in simulation.entities
    Possible fire states of a grid cell.
    CLI - Class in simulation.ui
    Command-line interface for the forest-fire simulation.
    CLI() - Constructor for class simulation.ui.CLI
     
    compute(Grid, int) - Static method in class simulation.entities.GridStats
    Scans the full grid and returns a new GridStats instance.
    computeStats() - Method in class simulation.services.Simulator
     
    Constants - Class in simulation.config
    Central place for all simulation constants.
    ControlPane - Class in simulation.ui
    JavaFX control bar displayed at the bottom of the main window.
    ControlPane(Simulator, GridCanvas, StatsPane) - Constructor for class simulation.ui.ControlPane
    Builds the full control bar.

    D

    decrementBurnCounter() - Method in class simulation.entities.Cell
    Decrements the burn counter by one.
    DEFAULT_GRID_HEIGHT - Static variable in class simulation.config.Constants
     
    DEFAULT_GRID_WIDTH - Static variable in class simulation.config.Constants
     
    DEFAULT_HEIGHT - Static variable in class simulation.entities.Grid
    Default grid height used when no size is specified.
    DEFAULT_RADIUS - Static variable in class simulation.services.RadialSpread
    Default radius in cells.
    DEFAULT_SPEED_MS - Static variable in class simulation.config.Constants
    Default delay between two time steps (ms).
    DEFAULT_WIDTH - Static variable in class simulation.entities.Grid
    Default grid width used when no size is specified.
    drawGrid(Grid) - Method in class simulation.ui.GridCanvas
    Redraws the entire grid on the canvas.
    DRY - Enum constant in enum class simulation.entities.Environment.Season
     

    E

    Environment - Class in simulation.entities
    Represents the global environmental conditions of the simulation.
    Environment() - Constructor for class simulation.entities.Environment
     
    Environment.Season - Enum Class in simulation.entities
     
    Environment.Sunlight - Enum Class in simulation.entities
     
    expand(int, int, int, int) - Method in class simulation.entities.Grid
    Expands the grid by adding new rows/columns on the requested sides.
    export(List, String) - Static method in class simulation.dao.SimulationCsvExporter
    Writes all snapshots to the given file path, with a header row.
    EXTENSION - Static variable in class simulation.dao.BinarySerializer
    File extension used for binary save files.
    extinctionProbability(Cell) - Static method in class simulation.utils.PhysicsFormulas
    Probability that a burning cell extinguishes spontaneously in one step.

    F

    FIRE_TEMPERATURE - Static variable in class simulation.config.Constants
    Temperature (°C) of a burning cell.
    FireBehaviour - Interface in simulation.services
    Contract that every burnable object in the simulation must fulfil.
    FIREBREAK - Enum constant in enum class simulation.entities.TerrainType
    Cleared strip that stops fire from spreading.
    FOREST - Enum constant in enum class simulation.entities.TerrainType
    Standard forest — can catch fire.
    FOREST_DENSITY_MIN - Static variable in class simulation.config.Constants
    Forest: minimum vegetation density.
    FOREST_DENSITY_RANGE - Static variable in class simulation.config.Constants
    Forest: random vegetation density range.
    FOREST_HUMIDITY_MIN - Static variable in class simulation.config.Constants
    Forest: minimum humidity.
    FOREST_HUMIDITY_RANGE - Static variable in class simulation.config.Constants
    Forest: random humidity range.
    FOREST_INFLAM_MIN - Static variable in class simulation.config.Constants
    Forest: minimum inflammability.
    FOREST_INFLAM_RANGE - Static variable in class simulation.config.Constants
    Forest: random inflammability range.
    FOREST_RESISTANCE_MIN - Static variable in class simulation.config.Constants
    Forest: minimum resistance.
    FOREST_RESISTANCE_RANGE - Static variable in class simulation.config.Constants
    Forest: random resistance range.
    foretBoreale() - Static method in class simulation.dao.PredefinedTopologies
    Forêt froide parsemée de milliers de petits lacs.
    foretDesLandes() - Static method in class simulation.dao.PredefinedTopologies
    Forêt de pins très géométrique, très dense, très inflammable et sèche.
    from(Grid, int, String, Wind) - Static method in class simulation.entities.SimulationSnapshot
    Builds a snapshot from the current simulation state.

    G

    generateRandom() - Static method in class simulation.dao.GridLoader
    Generates a random grid with default dimensions.
    generateRandom(int, int) - Static method in class simulation.dao.GridLoader
    Generates a random grid of the given size.
    getAlgorithmName() - Method in class simulation.entities.SimulationSnapshot
     
    getAvgHumidity() - Method in class simulation.entities.GridStats
     
    getAvgHumidity() - Method in class simulation.entities.SimulationSnapshot
     
    getAvgInflammability() - Method in class simulation.entities.GridStats
     
    getAvgInflammability() - Method in class simulation.entities.SimulationSnapshot
     
    getAvgResistance() - Method in class simulation.entities.SimulationSnapshot
     
    getAvgTemperature() - Method in class simulation.entities.GridStats
     
    getAvgTemperature() - Method in class simulation.entities.SimulationSnapshot
     
    getAvgVegetationDensity() - Method in class simulation.entities.SimulationSnapshot
     
    getBurnCounter() - Method in class simulation.entities.Cell
     
    getBurnedCells() - Method in class simulation.entities.GridStats
     
    getBurnedCells() - Method in class simulation.entities.SimulationSnapshot
     
    getBurnedPercent() - Method in class simulation.entities.GridStats
     
    getBurningCells() - Method in class simulation.entities.GridStats
     
    getBurningCells() - Method in class simulation.entities.SimulationSnapshot
     
    getBurningPercent() - Method in class simulation.entities.GridStats
     
    getCandidates(Cell, Grid) - Method in interface simulation.services.SpreadAlgorithm
    Returns the subset of SpreadAlgorithm.getNeighbours(Cell, Grid) that can currently catch fire — i.e. cells where Cell.canIgnite() returns true.
    getCell(int, int) - Method in class simulation.entities.Grid
    Returns the cell at (x, y).
    getDirection() - Method in class simulation.entities.Wind
     
    getDisplayName() - Method in enum class simulation.entities.Environment.Season
     
    getDisplayName() - Method in enum class simulation.entities.Environment.Sunlight
     
    getEnvironment() - Method in class simulation.services.Simulator
     
    getFirebreakCells() - Method in class simulation.entities.GridStats
     
    getFirebreakCells() - Method in class simulation.entities.SimulationSnapshot
     
    getForestCells() - Method in class simulation.entities.GridStats
     
    getForestCells() - Method in class simulation.entities.SimulationSnapshot
     
    getGrid() - Method in class simulation.services.Simulator
     
    getHeight() - Method in class simulation.entities.Grid
     
    getHeight() - Method in class simulation.entities.SimulationSnapshot
     
    getHistory() - Method in class simulation.services.Simulator
     
    getHumidity() - Method in class simulation.entities.Cell
     
    getHumidityModifier() - Method in enum class simulation.entities.Environment.Season
     
    getInflammability() - Method in class simulation.entities.Cell
     
    getIntactCells() - Method in class simulation.entities.GridStats
     
    getIntactCells() - Method in class simulation.entities.SimulationSnapshot
     
    getIntactPercent() - Method in class simulation.entities.GridStats
     
    getName() - Method in class simulation.services.MooreSpread
    Human-readable name shown in the GUI combo box.
    getName() - Method in class simulation.services.OrthogonalSpread
    Human-readable name shown in the GUI combo box.
    getName() - Method in class simulation.services.RadialSpread
    Human-readable name shown in the GUI combo box.
    getName() - Method in interface simulation.services.SpreadAlgorithm
    Human-readable name shown in the GUI combo box.
    getNeighbours(Cell, Grid) - Method in class simulation.services.MooreSpread
    Returns ALL geometrically reachable neighbours of cell according to this algorithm, regardless of their terrain type or fire state.
    getNeighbours(Cell, Grid) - Method in class simulation.services.OrthogonalSpread
    Returns ALL geometrically reachable neighbours of cell according to this algorithm, regardless of their terrain type or fire state.
    getNeighbours(Cell, Grid) - Method in class simulation.services.RadialSpread
    Returns ALL geometrically reachable neighbours of cell according to this algorithm, regardless of their terrain type or fire state.
    getNeighbours(Cell, Grid) - Method in interface simulation.services.SpreadAlgorithm
    Returns ALL geometrically reachable neighbours of cell according to this algorithm, regardless of their terrain type or fire state.
    getRadius() - Method in class simulation.services.RadialSpread
     
    getResistance() - Method in class simulation.entities.Cell
     
    getSeason() - Method in class simulation.entities.Environment
     
    getSpeed() - Method in class simulation.entities.Wind
     
    getSpeedMs() - Method in class simulation.services.Simulator
     
    getState() - Method in class simulation.entities.Cell
     
    getStep() - Method in class simulation.entities.GridStats
     
    getStep() - Method in class simulation.entities.SimulationSnapshot
     
    getStep() - Method in class simulation.services.Simulator

    getTemperature() - Method in class simulation.entities.Cell
     
    getTempModifier() - Method in enum class simulation.entities.Environment.Sunlight
     
    getTerrain() - Method in class simulation.entities.Cell
     
    getTotalCells() - Method in class simulation.entities.GridStats
     
    getTotalCells() - Method in class simulation.entities.SimulationSnapshot
     
    getUrbanCells() - Method in class simulation.entities.GridStats

    getWaterCells() - Method in class simulation.entities.GridStats
     
    getWaterCells() - Method in class simulation.entities.SimulationSnapshot
     
    getWetZoneCells() - Method in class simulation.entities.GridStats
     
    getWetZoneCells() - Method in class simulation.entities.SimulationSnapshot
     
    getWidth() - Method in class simulation.entities.Grid
     
    getWidth() - Method in class simulation.entities.SimulationSnapshot
     
    getWind() - Method in class simulation.services.Simulator
     
    getWindDirection() - Method in class simulation.entities.SimulationSnapshot

    getX() - Method in class simulation.entities.Cell
     
    getY() - Method in class simulation.entities.Cell
     
    grid - Variable in class simulation.entities.SavedState
    Restored grid.
    Grid - Class in simulation.entities
    Two-dimensional grid of Cell objects that represents the simulation terrain.
    Grid() - Constructor for class simulation.entities.Grid
    Creates a bounded grid with Grid.DEFAULT_WIDTH × Grid.DEFAULT_HEIGHT cells.
    Grid(int, int) - Constructor for class simulation.entities.Grid
    Creates a bounded grid of the given size filled with randomly typed cells.
    Grid(int, int, boolean) - Constructor for class simulation.entities.Grid
    Creates a grid with the given size, topology, and random cell content.
    GridCanvas - Class in simulation.ui
    JavaFX Canvas that renders the simulation grid.
    GridCanvas(Simulator) - Constructor for class simulation.ui.GridCanvas
    Creates the grid canvas bound to the given simulator.
    GridLoader - Class in simulation.dao
    Utility class for generating, saving and loading Grid objects.
    GridStats - Class in simulation.entities
    Computes live statistics from the current grid state.

    H

    heat(double) - Method in class simulation.entities.Cell
    Raises the cell temperature by delta degrees.
    heat(double) - Method in interface simulation.services.FireBehaviour
    Raises the cell temperature by delta degrees.
    HEAT_CONDUCTIVITY - Static variable in class simulation.config.Constants
    Heat conductivity fraction per step.
    HUMIDITY_DROP_PER_STEP - Static variable in class simulation.config.Constants
    Humidity drop per step when next to a burning cell.

    I

    igniteCell(int, int) - Method in class simulation.services.Simulator
    Ignites the cell at (x, y) if possible.
    ignitionProbability(Cell) - Static method in class simulation.utils.PhysicsFormulas
    Base probability that a cell catches fire when exposed to a burning neighbour.
    ignitionProbabilityWithWind(Cell, Wind, int, int) - Static method in class simulation.utils.PhysicsFormulas
    Ignition probability adjusted for wind direction and speed.
    INIT_TEMP_MAX - Static variable in class simulation.config.Constants
    Maximum initial temperature (°C).
    INIT_TEMP_MIN - Static variable in class simulation.config.Constants
    Minimum initial temperature (°C).
    INTACT - Enum constant in enum class simulation.entities.CellState
    The cell has not yet been reached by fire.
    isToroidal() - Method in class simulation.entities.Grid
    Returns true if this grid uses toroidal (wrap-around) topology.
    isValid(int, int) - Method in class simulation.entities.Grid
    Returns true if (x, y) is within the current grid bounds.

    L

    LegendPane - Class in simulation.ui
    JavaFX panel displaying the colour legend for terrain types and fire states.
    LegendPane() - Constructor for class simulation.ui.LegendPane
    Builds the legend pane.
    load(String) - Static method in class simulation.dao.BinarySerializer
    Loads a simulation state from a binary file previously created by BinarySerializer.save(Grid, Wind, String).
    load(String) - Static method in class simulation.dao.GridLoader
    Loads a grid from a CSV file previously saved by GridLoader.save(Grid, String).
    loadBinary(String) - Method in class simulation.services.Simulator
    Loads state from a binary file.
    loadGrid(Grid) - Method in class simulation.services.Simulator
    Loads a new grid, resetting simulation state.

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class simulation.Main
     
    main(String[]) - Static method in class simulation.ui.CLI
    Entry point for command-line mode.
    main(String[]) - Static method in class simulation.ui.MainApp
    Application entry point — delegates to JavaFX launch mechanism.
    Main - Class in simulation
    Main entry point of the application.
    Main() - Constructor for class simulation.Main
     
    MainApp - Class in simulation.ui
    JavaFX application entry point.
    MainApp() - Constructor for class simulation.ui.MainApp
     
    MAX_HEIGHT - Static variable in class simulation.entities.Grid
    Maximum allowed grid height in cells.
    MAX_SPEED - Static variable in class simulation.entities.Wind
    Maximum allowed wind speed (normalised).
    MAX_SPEED_MS - Static variable in class simulation.config.Constants
    Maximum delay (slowest simulation).
    MAX_WIDTH - Static variable in class simulation.entities.Grid
    Maximum allowed grid width in cells.
    MIN_SPEED_MS - Static variable in class simulation.config.Constants
    Minimum delay (fastest simulation).
    MooreSpread - Class in simulation.services
    Fire-spread algorithm based on the Moore neighbourhood: the 8 surrounding cells (4 orthogonal + 4 diagonal).
    MooreSpread() - Constructor for class simulation.services.MooreSpread
     
    moveCamera(int, int) - Method in class simulation.ui.GridCanvas
    Moves the camera offset.

    N

    NORMAL - Enum constant in enum class simulation.entities.Environment.Season
     
    NORMAL - Enum constant in enum class simulation.entities.Environment.Sunlight
     

    O

    ON_FIRE - Enum constant in enum class simulation.entities.CellState
    The cell is currently burning.
    OrthogonalSpread - Class in simulation.services
    Fire-spread algorithm that considers only the 4 orthogonal neighbours (North, South, East, West).
    OrthogonalSpread() - Constructor for class simulation.services.OrthogonalSpread
     

    P

    paintZone(int, int, int, int, TerrainType) - Method in class simulation.services.Simulator
    Paints a rectangular zone with the given terrain type.
    PhysicsFormulas - Class in simulation.utils
    Stateless utility class that groups all physical formulas used by the simulation.
    PredefinedTopologies - Class in simulation.dao
    Factory class that provides hand-crafted grid topologies for quick scenario testing.
    prepareStart() - Method in class simulation.services.Simulator
    Records the initial snapshot the first time the simulation starts.
    PROB_FIREBREAK - Static variable in class simulation.config.Constants
    Probability a random cell becomes a firebreak.
    PROB_URBAN - Static variable in class simulation.config.Constants
    Probability a random cell becomes urban.
    PROB_WATER - Static variable in class simulation.config.Constants
    Probability a random cell becomes water.
    PROB_WET_ZONE - Static variable in class simulation.config.Constants
    Probability a random cell becomes a wet zone.

    R

    RadialSpread - Class in simulation.services
    Fire-spread algorithm that considers all cells within a circular radius R.
    RadialSpread() - Constructor for class simulation.services.RadialSpread
    Creates a radial algorithm with the default radius.
    RadialSpread(int) - Constructor for class simulation.services.RadialSpread
    Creates a radial algorithm with a custom radius.
    reset() - Method in class simulation.services.Simulator
    Resets to initial state.
    resetZoom() - Method in class simulation.ui.GridCanvas
    Resets cell size to fit the screen.

    S

    save(Grid, String) - Static method in class simulation.dao.GridLoader
    Saves the grid to a CSV file.
    save(Grid, Wind, String) - Static method in class simulation.dao.BinarySerializer
    Saves the grid and wind to a binary file.
    saveBinary(String) - Method in class simulation.services.Simulator
    Saves current state to a binary file.
    SavedState - Class in simulation.entities
    Holds the result of a binary load operation.
    SavedState(Grid, Wind) - Constructor for class simulation.entities.SavedState
     
    setAlgorithm(SpreadAlgorithm) - Method in class simulation.services.Simulator
     
    setBurnCounter(int) - Method in class simulation.entities.Cell
     
    setCell(int, int, Cell) - Method in class simulation.entities.Grid
    Replaces the cell at (x, y).
    setDirection(double) - Method in class simulation.entities.Wind
     
    setHumidity(double) - Method in class simulation.entities.Cell
    Sets humidity, clamped to [0.0, 1.0].
    setInflammability(double) - Method in class simulation.entities.Cell
    Sets inflammability, clamped to [0.0, 1.0].
    setOnRefresh(Consumer) - Method in class simulation.services.Simulator
    Sets a callback invoked after every grid update (step, ignite, load…).
    setPaintTerrain(TerrainType) - Method in class simulation.ui.GridCanvas
    Sets the terrain type used for brush/zone painting.
    setRadius(int) - Method in class simulation.services.RadialSpread
    Changes the spread radius.
    setResistance(double) - Method in class simulation.entities.Cell
    Sets resistance, clamped to [0.0, 1.0].
    setSeason(Environment.Season) - Method in class simulation.entities.Environment
     
    setSpeed(double) - Method in class simulation.entities.Wind
    Sets speed, clamped to [0.0, MAX_SPEED].
    setSpeed(int) - Method in class simulation.services.Simulator
     
    setState(CellState) - Method in class simulation.entities.Cell
     
    setSunlight(Environment.Sunlight) - Method in class simulation.entities.Environment
     
    setTemperature(double) - Method in class simulation.entities.Cell
     
    setTerrain(TerrainType) - Method in class simulation.entities.Cell
     
    setToroidal(boolean) - Method in class simulation.entities.Grid
    Switches topology mode.
    setToroidal(boolean) - Method in class simulation.services.Simulator
     
    setVegetationDensity(double) - Method in class simulation.entities.Cell
    Sets vegetation density, clamped to [0.0, 1.0].
    setWind(Wind) - Method in class simulation.services.Simulator
     
    SHADOW - Enum constant in enum class simulation.entities.Environment.Sunlight
     
    simulation - package simulation
     
    simulation.config - package simulation.config
     
    simulation.dao - package simulation.dao
     
    simulation.entities - package simulation.entities
     
    simulation.services - package simulation.services
     
    simulation.ui - package simulation.ui
     
    simulation.utils - package simulation.utils
     
    SimulationCsvExporter - Class in simulation.dao
    Exports a list of SimulationSnapshot objects to a CSV file.
    SimulationSnapshot - Class in simulation.entities
    Immutable snapshot of the simulation state at a single time step.
    Simulator - Class in simulation.services
    Central controller of the forest-fire simulation.
    Simulator() - Constructor for class simulation.services.Simulator
    Initialises with default settings and a random grid.
    SpreadAlgorithm - Interface in simulation.services
    Strategy interface for fire-spread algorithms.
    start(Stage) - Method in class simulation.ui.MainApp
     
    StatsPane - Class in simulation.ui
    JavaFX panel showing live simulation statistics.
    StatsPane() - Constructor for class simulation.ui.StatsPane
    Builds the statistics pane with all charts initialised.
    stepOnce() - Method in class simulation.services.Simulator
    Advances exactly one time step (step-by-step mode).
    SUNNY - Enum constant in enum class simulation.entities.Environment.Sunlight
     

    T

    temperatureDelta(Cell) - Static method in class simulation.utils.PhysicsFormulas
    Temperature increase received by a neighbour from an adjacent burning cell.
    TerrainType - Enum Class in simulation.entities
    Types of terrain that a grid cell can represent.
    timeStep() - Method in class simulation.services.Simulator
    Advances the simulation by one time step (double-buffered).

    U

    update(GridStats) - Method in class simulation.ui.StatsPane
    Refreshes all labels and charts with the latest statistics.
    URBAN_ZONE - Enum constant in enum class simulation.entities.TerrainType
    Built-up urban area — treated as non-flammable in this simulation.

    V

    valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class simulation.entities.CellState
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class simulation.entities.Environment.Season
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class simulation.entities.Environment.Sunlight
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class simulation.entities.TerrainType
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    values() - Static method in enum class simulation.entities.CellState
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
    values() - Static method in enum class simulation.entities.Environment.Season
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
    values() - Static method in enum class simulation.entities.Environment.Sunlight
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
    values() - Static method in enum class simulation.entities.TerrainType
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.

    W

    WATER - Enum constant in enum class simulation.entities.TerrainType
    Water body — completely non-flammable.
    WET - Enum constant in enum class simulation.entities.Environment.Season
     
    WET_ZONE - Enum constant in enum class simulation.entities.TerrainType
    Humid area — high moisture, very low inflammability.
    WET_ZONE_HUMIDITY - Static variable in class simulation.config.Constants
    Wet zone: fixed humidity.
    WET_ZONE_INFLAM - Static variable in class simulation.config.Constants
    Wet zone: fixed inflammability.
    wind - Variable in class simulation.entities.SavedState
    Restored wind.
    Wind - Class in simulation.entities
    Represents the wind: a direction (radians) and a speed normalised to [0.0, MAX_SPEED].
    Wind() - Constructor for class simulation.entities.Wind
    Creates a wind with no movement.
    Wind(double, double) - Constructor for class simulation.entities.Wind
    Creates a wind with the given direction and speed.
    windFactor(Wind, int, int) - Static method in class simulation.utils.PhysicsFormulas
    Wind factor that amplifies or reduces fire spread toward a given direction.

    Z

    zoomIn() - Method in class simulation.ui.GridCanvas
    Increases cell size.
    zoomOut() - Method in class simulation.ui.GridCanvas
    Decreases cell size.
    A B C D E F G H I L M N O P R S T U V W Z 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values
